title: Geronimo Stilton, Secret Agent
titleZh: 杰罗尼摩·斯提尔顿，秘密特工
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's old school friend turns out to be a secret agent and helps him chase a very important lost envelope all across New Mouse City! 🕵️

q.en: The rodent in dark sunglasses following Geronimo turned out to be someone from his past. Who was it?
q.zh: 那个戴着墨镜跟踪杰罗尼摩的老鼠，原来是他的旧相识。那是谁？

options.en: Kornelius von Kickpaw, his old elementary school friend
options.zh: 科尼利厄斯·冯·基克波，他小学时的老朋友
他的表哥特拉普·斯提尔顿
他的敌人萨莉·拉特穆森

explain.en: The follower took off his sunglasses and revealed himself as Kornelius von Kickpaw, Geronimo's friend from elementary school whom he had not seen in years.
explain.zh: 那个跟踪者摘下墨镜，原来是他小学时的朋友科尼利厄斯·冯·基克波，杰罗尼摩已经多年没见过他了。

q.en: What was Kornelius von Kickpaw's secret job and code name?
q.zh: 科尼利厄斯·冯·基克波的秘密工作和代号分别是什么？

options.en: A secret agent with the code name OOK
options.zh: 一名代号为OOK的秘密特工

options.en: An editor at The Rodent's Gazette
The owner of a cheese factory

explain.en: Kornelius whispered that his code name was OOK and that he worked on secret missions for the government of Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 科尼利厄斯小声说他的代号是OOK，并且为老鼠岛政府执行秘密任务。

q.en: In elementary school, how did Kornelius help Geronimo?
q.zh: 在小学时，科尼利厄斯是怎样帮助杰罗尼摩的？

options.en: He rescued Geronimo from bullies who stuffed him in a gym locker
options.zh: 他把被恶霸塞进更衣室储物柜的杰罗尼摩救了出来

options.en: He taught Geronimo to tie his shoes
He gave Geronimo a cheese sandwich
options.zh: 他给了杰罗尼摩一个奶酪三明治

options.en: He helped Geronimo with math homework
options.zh: 他帮杰罗尼摩做数学作业

explain.en: When Wendell Wild Whiskers and his gang stuffed Geronimo into a locker, Kornelius ripped it open and made Wendell apologize, so the bullies never picked on him again.
explain.zh: 当温德尔·威尔德胡须和他的同伙把杰罗尼摩塞进储物柜时，科尼利厄斯把它撬开，还逼温德尔道歉，从此那些恶霸再也不敢欺负他了。

q.en: What important document was inside the envelope with the red seal that Geronimo lost?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩弄丢的那个红色封印信封里，装着的究竟是什么重要文件？

options.en: The deed to the land where The Rodent's Gazette stands

options.zh: 一封萨莉·拉特穆森写的信

explain.en: Grandfather William revealed the envelope held the deed to the land — the only proof they owned the property where The Rodent's Gazette is built.
explain.zh: 威廉爷爷说信封里装的是那块土地的契约，也是他们拥有《老鼠公报》所在地财产的唯一证明。

q.en: How did the red-sealed envelope leave Geronimo's office?
q.zh: 那个红封印信封是怎么离开杰罗尼摩的办公室的？

options.en: A gust of wind blew it out the open window
options.zh: 一阵风把它从开着的窗户吹了出去
萨莉·拉特穆森偷偷偷走了它
科尼利厄斯把它带走了

explain.en: Geronimo had left his window wide open, and a fierce wind lifted the envelope off his desk and blew it straight out the window.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩前一晚忘了关窗，一阵狂风把信封从桌上卷起，直接吹出了窗外。

q.en: Kornelius's sister Veronica is also a secret agent. What is her code name?
q.zh: 科尼利厄斯的妹妹维罗妮卡也是一名秘密特工。她的代号是什么？

explain.en: Kornelius pointed to a painting of his sister Veronica above the fireplace and said her code name was 00V; she was a secret agent too.
explain.zh: 科尼利厄斯指着壁炉上方妹妹维罗妮卡的画像说，她的代号是00V，她同样是一名秘密特工。

q.en: After a wild chase, where did the lost envelope finally land?
q.zh: 经过一番疯狂追逐，那个丢失的信封最后落在了哪里？

options.en: In the office of Sally Ratmousen, his enemy
options.zh: 落在了他的敌人萨莉·拉特穆森的办公室里
在科尼利厄斯的豪宅里

explain.en: The wind carried the envelope higher and higher until it slipped through an open window — the window of Sally Ratmousen, owner of The Daily Rat and Geronimo's rival.
explain.zh: 风把信封越吹越高，最后从一扇开着的窗户飘了进去——那正是萨莉·拉特穆森的窗户，她是《老鼠日报》的老板，也是杰罗尼摩的对手。

q.en: Down in the sewer, what creature was holding the red-sealed envelope in its jaws?
q.zh: 在下水道里，是什么生物用嘴巴叼着那个红封印信封？

options.en: A crocodile with glowing yellow eyes
options.zh: 一只长着发光黄眼睛的鳄鱼

explain.en: In the dark sewer, a pair of glittering yellow eyes turned out to belong to an enormous crocodile that was holding the envelope in its ferocious jaws.
explain.zh: 在黑暗的下水道里，那双闪着光的黄眼睛属于一只巨大的鳄鱼，它正用凶猛的嘴巴叼着那个信封。

q.en: What trick did Geronimo use to snatch the envelope away from Sally Ratmousen?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩用了什么花招，从萨莉·拉特穆森手里抢走了信封？

options.en: He pretended she had broken a paw-nail, making her panic
options.zh: 他假装她弄断了指甲，让她慌了神
他叫科尼利厄斯来帮忙

explain.en: Geronimo whispered that Sally had broken a paw-nail; she flew into a frenzy looking for it, and in that moment he grabbed the envelope.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩小声说萨莉弄断了指甲，她顿时慌乱地四处查看，就在这时他一把抓过了信封。

q.en: A mysterious figure with a delicate perfume kept rescuing Geronimo. Who was it?
q.zh: 一个带着淡淡香水味的神秘身影一次次救了杰罗尼摩。那是谁？

options.zh: 秘密特工维罗妮卡，代号00V
他的妹妹西奥·斯提尔顿

explain.en: Each time the rescuer said 'I'm here to help' and left a delicate perfume — the same scent left behind when 00V (Veronica, Kornelius's sister) vanished earlier.
explain.zh: 每次救他的人都说着“我是来帮忙的”，并留下一股淡淡的香水味——这股香味正是之前00V（科尼利厄斯的妹妹维罗妮卡）消失时留下的。
